title: Spicy Egyptian Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and spicy Egyptian-inspired rice bowl dish, perfect for a quick and easy lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the fideo and cook until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the egyptian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the water is absorbed.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the spicy cayenne pepper and zesty lemon juice.
Top with crushed fried onions and serve.
